title: Canva MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Canva MCP Server for Claude
Browse, summarize, and generate Canva designs directly from Claude
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Canva
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `design` `canva` `graphics` `templates` `creative`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status canva
```

## Config
```json
{
  "canva": {
    "url": "https://mcp.canva.com/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status canva

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/canva-mcp-server
- https://www.canva.dev/docs/connect/canva-mcp-server-setup/
